## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run check`
- [ ] Direct behavior verified
- [ ] Downstream effects checked

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, generated credentials, local runtime data, logs, databases, or Docker volumes included
- [ ] Room isolation considered
- [ ] Provider binding and credential materialization considered
- [ ] Runtime and scheduled-job effects considered
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior or setup changed
